L1.area: Change request rendering and UI template layer

L2.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability allows a user without any specific rights to perform script injection and remote code execution by inserting a crafted title when creating a new change request. The title value is rendered without proper output escaping in the user interface, allowing arbitrary script execution in the context of other users' sessions.

L3.area: Change request rendering and UI template layer
L3.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability allows a user without any specific rights to perform script injection and remote code execution by inserting a crafted title when creating a new change request. The title value is rendered without proper output escaping in the user interface, allowing arbitrary script execution in the context of other users' sessions.

ground_truth.reason: The change request title is rendered without escaping in the UI template, allowing an attacker to inject arbitrary scripts via a crafted title that executes in other users' browsers.
